response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience and a strong background in diverse technologies, including C++ early in his career. However, his recent work has shifted toward TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development, with limited recent C++ exposure. His open-source contributions and leadership in tooling are strong positives, but alignment with the role's core C++, industrial automation, and cybersecurity requirements is partial.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development (20+ years) with leadership in full-stack and tooling projects.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Demonstrated ability to work with low-latency, high-performance systems (e.g., DLang at Sociomantic).
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience; last notable C++ work was at National Instruments (2000–2001).
No explicit mention of industrial automation, IoT, or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards in resume.
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than embedded/cloud C++ systems.
